name: codex-feishu
description: Local Codex plugin that bridges Feishu text conversations into Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Configure and run a local Feishu bot bridge for Codex
interface.longDescription: Configure Feishu credentials through MCP tools, start a local daemon, and bridge Feishu text messages into local Codex sessions.
defaultPrompt: Configure my Feishu App ID and App Secret
Start the local Feishu bridge daemon
Show the current bridge status and bindings
